jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Jaypore - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Jaypore invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
